title: Client survey on the impact of COVID-19 on immigration plans - Canada.ca
content:
## Client survey on the impact of COVID-19 on immigration plans
Ottawa, Friday, June 12, 2020— Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) has invited some clients to answer a survey to understand how COVID-19 is potentially impacting plans to come to, return to, or stay in Canada.
By collecting these survey responses, IRCC will better understand how our clients are experiencing COVID-19 and the volumes of applications or arrivals to Canada that IRCC can expect in the near future.
Completing the survey is voluntary. Your participation will be kept confidential. What you tell us won’t affect any past, current, or future application with IRCC.
If you don’t get an invitation to take the survey, we welcome your input and encourage you to submit feedback .

## About the invitation to take the survey
- The email will be sent from IRCC.COMMDoNotReply-NePasRepondreCOMM.IRCC@cic.gc.ca.
- The link to the survey will start with https://na1se.voxco.com/.
- The email won’t have any attachments.
